targets.rawSql: WITH run_ids AS (SELECT DISTINCT rrs.run_id FROM request_run_summaries rrs WHERE $__timeFilter(rrs.source_received_at)), runtime AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(rc.total_tokens), 0)::numeric AS total_tokens, COALESCE(SUM(rc.prompt_tokens * COALESCE((rc.generation_config->>'input_cost_per_million_tokens')::numeric, 0) / 1000000.0 + rc.completion_tokens * COALESCE((rc.generation_config->>'output_cost_per_million_tokens')::numeric, 0) / 1000000.0), 0)::numeric(20,8) AS total_cost_usd FROM request_captures rc JOIN request_run_summaries rrs ON rrs.request_id = rc.request_id WHERE $__timeFilter(rrs.source_received_at)), judge_generation AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(j.total_tokens), 0)::numeric AS total_tokens, COALESCE(SUM(j.total_cost_usd), 0)::numeric(20,8) AS total_cost_usd FROM judge_llm_calls j WHERE j.run_id IN (SELECT run_id FROM run_ids) AND j.stage_name = 'judge_generation'), judge_retrieval AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(j.total_tokens), 0)::numeric AS total_tokens, COALESCE(SUM(j.total_cost_usd), 0)::numeric(20,8) AS total_cost_usd FROM judge_llm_calls j WHERE j.run_id IN (SELECT run_id FROM run_ids) AND j.stage_name = 'judge_retrieval'), judge_total AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(j.total_tokens), 0)::numeric AS total_tokens, COALESCE(SUM(j.total_cost_usd), 0)::numeric(20,8) AS total_cost_usd FROM judge_llm_calls j WHERE j.run_id IN (SELECT run_id FROM run_ids)), run_total AS (SELECT (SELECT total_tokens FROM runtime) + (SELECT total_tokens FROM judge_total) AS total_tokens, (SELECT total_cost_usd FROM runtime) + (SELECT total_cost_usd FROM judge_total) AS total_cost_usd) SELECT scope, total_tokens, total_cost_usd FROM (VALUES (1, 'runtime', (SELECT total_tokens FROM runtime), (SELECT total_cost_usd FROM runtime)), (2, 'judge_generation', (SELECT total_tokens FROM judge_generation), (SELECT total_cost_usd FROM judge_generation)), (3, 'judge_retrieval', (SELECT total_tokens FROM judge_retrieval), (SELECT total_cost_usd FROM judge_retrieval)), (4, 'judge_total', (SELECT total_tokens FROM judge_total), (SELECT total_cost_usd FROM judge_total)), (5, 'run_total', (SELECT total_tokens FROM run_total), (SELECT total_cost_usd FROM run_total))) AS t(ord, scope, total_tokens, total_cost_usd) ORDER BY ord

WITH scoped_runs AS (SELECT rrs.run_id, min(rrs.source_received_at) AS started_at, count(*) AS request_count, max(rrs.retriever_kind) AS retriever_kind, max(rc.retriever_config->'strategy'->>'kind') AS sparse_strategy_kind, max(rc.retriever_config->>'chunking_strategy') AS chunking_strategy, max(rc.reranker_kind) AS reranker_kind, max(rc.reranker_config->'cross_encoder'->>'model_name') AS reranker_model, max(rc.generation_model) AS runtime_model, max(rrs.judge_generation_model) AS judge_model, CASE WHEN count(*) FILTER (WHERE esp.status::text = 'failed') > 0 THEN 'failed' WHEN count(*) FILTER (WHERE esp.status::text = 'completed') = count(*) THEN 'completed' ELSE 'running' END AS status FROM request_run_summaries rrs JOIN request_captures rc ON rc.request_id = rrs.request_id LEFT JOIN eval_processing_state esp ON esp.request_id = rrs.request_id WHERE $__timeFilter(rrs.source_received_at) GROUP BY rrs.run_id) SELECT run_id, started_at, request_count, chunking_strategy AS chunking, CASE WHEN retriever_kind = 'Hybrid' AND sparse_strategy_kind = 'bag_of_words' THEN 'Hybrid - bow' WHEN retriever_kind = 'Hybrid' AND sparse_strategy_kind = 'bm25_like' THEN 'Hybrid - bm25' ELSE retriever_kind END AS retriever, reranker_kind AS reranker, reranker_model, runtime_model, judge_model, status FROM scoped_runs ORDER BY started_at DESC, run_id DESC
